name: Nora Mill Whole Wheat Muffins
recipeIngredient: 2 cups NORA MILL whole wheat flour mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 475 degrees F.
2. Grease muffin tins.
3. Beat eggs and milk in a bowl until combined.
4. Add melted butter to the mixture and stir well.
5. Stir in the whole wheat flour mix (do not overmix; leave it slightly lumpy).
6. Divide the batter evenly among the prepared muffin tins.
7. Bake for 20 minutes, or until the muffins are firm and pull away from the sides of the pan.
